The [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] '''Model Fac L-113''' was a light vehicle factory, modeled after a typical [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] manufacturing plant on [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]. This model was pre-fabricated, so that it could be set up or taken down relatively quickly to begin manufacturing new vehicles for Imperial forces. Originally designed to manufacture [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST's]], however, it could also be be retrofitted for the production of the [[TIE ap-1|TIE maulers]] and [[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M ''Saber''-class repulsor tanks]].
